I found your dental appointment — Dentist Appointment on 2024-05-18, 09:00–10:00 at Downtown Dental Clinic (event id 5). I can reschedule it, but I need a bit more info before I proceed.

Please tell me which of these you want me to do:
1) Set it to a specific new date and time (tell me the date and start time).  
2) Find the next available 1-hour slot that fits your calendar within a date range you give me (e.g., “next week”, or “between May 20–24”, and preferred time of day). I can then propose options and reschedule the event once you pick one.  
3) If you want me to contact the clinic directly to move the appointment, please provide the clinic’s contact email or phone and any scheduling preferences.

Also confirm:
- Keep the same location and duration (1 hour)?  
- Should I notify any other participants or just update your calendar?

Which option do you want?
